name: Tufted Canvas Round Storage Bin - Cloud Island™ Gray/Cream Large
description:
Help keep your little one's essential items within easy reach with this Tufted Canvas Round Storage Bin from cloud island™. This round storage bin brings a playful, contrasting look to your child's playroom or baby's nursery. It features a gray canvas construction that's decorated with tufted, cream-colored stripes for a touch of fluffy texture and added visual interest. This practical storage bin is designed with two attached handles for easy portability, allowing you to move it anywhere around the room to keep their toys, books, stuffed animals, and other essentials organized.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
